steps.name: project-setup
steps.summary: Initialized Next.js 15 + TypeScript strict + Tailwind CSS v3 + Vitest 2 (jsdom) + ESLint at repo root; npm/vitest run; one smoke test green.

steps.name: core-types
steps.summary: Defined domain types (Priority, Tag, RecurrencePreset, RecurrenceRule, Todo, CompletionLogEntry, AppState) and type guards (isTodo, isAppState) in types/todo.ts; 23 guard unit tests all green.

steps.name: persistence
steps.summary: Created persistence/storage.ts with STORAGE_KEY/STORAGE_VERSION envelope, loadState/saveState/emptyState; SSR-safe (typeof window guard), absorbs all errors (corrupt JSON, version mismatch, isAppState failure, quota-exceeded); localStorage mocked via globalThis in 10 unit tests.

steps.name: store
steps.summary: Pure reducer (actions: add/edit/toggle/delete/hydrate; delete cascades to subtasks by parentId) in store/reducer.ts; TodoProvider client component with client-only hydration and persist-on-change effects in store/TodoProvider.tsx; useTodos() hook throws outside provider; hydrated boolean exposed for skeleton UI; 13 reducer unit tests all green.

steps.name: app-shell-views
steps.summary: ViewId ('today'|'upcoming'|'all'|'completed') + classify(todos,today)/dueStatus(dueDate,today) in lib/views.ts (pure, string-compare); AppShell feature in features/AppShell.tsx (getTodayString helper, empty-state onboarding, skeleton); Sidebar in components/Sidebar.tsx (desktop nav + mobile bottom tab bar); TodoProvider mounted in app/layout.tsx; 12 lib unit tests + 3 RTL shell tests all green.
